name: Valen Dreth
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing a sack cloth shirt and sack cloth pants. Carries a small amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: taunting, hostile, restless, imprisoned
Role: Valen Dreth is a prisoner in the Imperial Prison. He is the first person encountered in the game, occupying the cell opposite the player's and immediately taunting them.
Home Location Information: A cell in the Imperial Prison.
Daily Routine: Valen spends all his days pacing around his cell, never stopping to either eat or sleep.
Personality - The Relentless Mocker: Valen is hostile and taunting from the first moment of contact. His restless pacing and constant mockery suggest someone consumed by bitterness and aggression. He directs his taunts at fellow prisoners, taking what pleasure he can from antagonizing others in his confined situation. His sleepless, endless pacing reveals a deeply agitated mind.
author: Bethesda
